long_description:
[MON] Sysdig Agents Not Deployed is Triggered

TIP Situation: Sysdig agents are not deployed on some nodes
TIP Short Description: Sysdig agents are not deployed on some nodes in mzone2j7 for the past 24 hours
TIP Console: toc
TIP CRN: crn:v1:::is-platform-integration:au-syd::mzone2j7::
IPOPS Enabled: False

Event Generated:

Severity:         Medium
Metric:

Segment:
